title: Pionerens idékatalog til tematiske netværk
subtitle: Forslag til at udforme og implementere tematiske netværk for at maksimere brugernes engagement og projektets virkning og effekt
description: A guide for coordinators and participants of thematic multi-actor networks in European agriculture, providing a framework for designing and implementing networks to maximize user engagement, impact, and sustainability. It outlines the multi-actor approach, strategies for knowledge exchange, facilitation techniques, and methods to measure network effectiveness.
